title: lilium davidii var. unicolor
intro: Lilium davidii var. unicolor, also known as the white lily or David's lily, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family, native to the mountainous regions of China and Tibet. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lilium davidii var. unicolor include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. It is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used as a tincture or added to herbal supplements.
